transcript:
CALLER: Hi, I wanted to know which specialities you have at your clinic. Like departments.
AGENT: Sure! Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic has Cardiology, Orthopaedics, Neurology, Gynaecology, Paediatrics, Dermatology, ENT, Ophthalmology, Gastroenterology, Endocrinology, Psychiatry, Physiotherapy, and Radiology. We also have a full pathology lab.
CALLER: Wow, that's quite comprehensive. Do you have a neonatal ICU?
AGENT: We have a NICU with 6 beds for newborn care. Our neonatologist is on call round the clock.
CALLER: And do you handle high-risk pregnancies?
AGENT: Yes, our gynaecology team is experienced with high-risk pregnancies. Dr. Kavitha Reddy specialises in that area.
CALLER: Very good. I'll be visiting soon. Thank you.
